content:
If you want to create AI videos without paying every month, these two tools are worth trying

3 min read
Just now

--

A few months ago, I wanted to make a short AI video for a project.
I thought it would be easy.
I searched for “free AI video generator” and opened one website after another.
Every tool looked amazing until I clicked the pricing page.
Most free plans let me generate only a few videos before asking for a subscription. Others locked important features behind a paywall.
If you are just learning AI or creating videos for fun, paying every month does not always make sense.
After trying several tools, I found two free options that are actually useful. They are not perfect, but they can help you create good videos without spending money.
Press enter or click to view image in full size

Gnerated with Chatgpt1. Meta AI
Meta AI is one of the easiest AI video generators I have used.
You simply describe the scene you want, and the AI creates a short video based on your prompt.
The results are often impressive, especially if you write a clear prompt.
It is a great choice for social media clips, creative ideas, and quick visual concepts.
The biggest limitation is that videos created on the free plan include a watermark.
For many casual users, this is not a big problem. However, if you need clean videos for professional work, you may need to look at other tools or consider a paid option.
Overall, it is still one of the best free AI video generators available today.
2. YouTube Create
The second tool is YouTube Create.
Many people think it is only a mobile video editor, but it also includes AI powered features that make video creation much easier.
The app is completely free and very beginner friendly.
You can quickly edit videos, add captions, music, and effects without needing advanced editing skills.
However, it has two important limitations.
First, it does not currently support creating videos in a 16:9 landscape format, which can be a drawback if you mainly publish long YouTube videos.
Second, there is no web version.
You can only use it on your mobile device.
If you prefer editing on a computer, this may not fit your workflow.
Even with these limits, YouTube Create is an excellent free option for creating short videos.
The biggest misconception
Many people believe that free AI video generators are not worth using.
That is simply not true.
Most free tools have a few limitations.
Some include watermarks.
Some limit video length.
Others offer fewer editing features than their paid versions.
But that does not mean they are bad.
If you are learning, testing ideas, or creating content for social media, free tools are often more than enough.
You do not need an expensive subscription to get started.
Which one should you choose?
Choose Meta AI if your goal is to generate videos directly from text prompts.
Choose YouTube Create if you want a simple mobile app for editing and creating short videos.
Neither tool is perfect.
Both have limitations.
But if your budget is zero, these are two of the best free AI video tools you can start using today.
